utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items with a description and a cost field for each. Each item specifies both the type of coverage and an explicit cost figure, and total_budget includes a total monthly cost. Therefore, all items appear and are fully specified according to the requested details (coverage type and costs, plus total budget breakdown).

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific items: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health), LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property/home contents), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under their respective categories and extracted the exact rating numbers.
